transcript: What I'm asking you is how many times have you snitched on a fellow inmate? This makes my fourth. This makes your fourth time. Four times you've testified for the prosecution against a fellow inmate. Makes you a popular man, Mr. Collins.
tagged_transcript: [serious] What I'm asking you is [short pause] how many times have you snitched [short pause] on a fellow inmate? This makes my fourth. [serious] This makes your fourth time. [short pause] Four times [short pause] you've testified [short pause] for the prosecution [short pause] against a fellow inmate. [sarcastic] Makes you a popular man, Mr. Collins.
style_direction: Speak with a firm, clear, mid-range male voice. Deliver with an interrogative and occasionally sarcastic tone.
